ddls:
CREATE TABLE "members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the member */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the member joined the book club */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the member (e.g., admin, librarian, member) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the member */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the member (e.g., active, suspended, expired) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the member logged into the system */,
  "total_borrowed" INTEGER /* Total number of books borrowed by the member */,
  "total_fines_paid" REAL /* Cumulative total of fines paid by the member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who wrote the book */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre of the book */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publisher of the book */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the book was published */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN number of the book */,
  "edition" TEXT /* Edition number of the book */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language in which the book is written */,
  "total_copies" INTEGER /* Total number of copies of the book available in the library */,
  "available_copies" INTEGER /* Number of copies currently available for borrowing */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the book based on reviews */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the author */,
  "date_of_death" TEXT /* Date of death of the author (if applicable) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the author */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website or social media link of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "borrowings" (
  "borrowing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borrowing event */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member who borrowed the book */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book borrowed */,
  "borrow_date" TEXT /* Date the book was borrowed */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date the book is due to be returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the book was returned */,
  "fine_status" TEXT /* Fine status of the borrowing (e.g., unpaid, paid) */,
  "renewal_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the book has been renewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borrowing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_borrowings_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_borrowings_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fines" (
  "fine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fine */,
  "borrowing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borrowing event that incurred the fine */,
  "fine_date" TEXT /* Date the fine was paid */,
  "fine_amount" REAL /* Amount of the fine */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, cash, online) */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member who wrote the review */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the book (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments about the book */,
  "spoiler_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the review contains spoilers */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of times other members found the review helpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member to whom the book is recommended */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being recommended */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the recommendation (e.g., system, librarian, member) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member to whom the notification is sent */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., overdue book, new book arrival) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read, archived) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Detailed message of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the log entry was made */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message describing the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)
